name: Avocado Relish
recipeIngredient: 1/2 medium avocado (about 1/4 pound), peeled and finely diced
1 mild or hot chili pepper, seeded
2 teaspoons olive oil or vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the avocado and lime juice; set aside.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together the remaining ingredients: diced red onion, red bell pepper, green bell pepper, plum tomatoes, chopped cilantro, chopped parsley, chili pepper, garlic, olive oil or vegetable oil, salt, and pepper.
3. Gently fold the mixed vegetables into the avocado mixture.
4. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
5. Just before serving, stir well to combine all ingredients.
6. This relish makes 4 servings, approximately 1/2 cup each and pairs nicely with broiled chicken or fish.
